description: A visitor arrives at an attraction 30 minutes after their scheduled timed-entry slot.

nodes.task_description: Scan the visitor's ticket and note the missed time slot.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the ticket was for a previous time slot.

nodes.task_description: Check the attraction's policy for late arrivals and the current capacity.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the policy allows for entry within a 1-hour grace period if capacity permits.

nodes.task_description: Allow the visitor to enter, as they are within the grace period and capacity is not an issue.

expected_outcome.value: Agent validates the ticket and allows the visitor to enter.
